Literal.Value: '“IGDB Visits”: Game page visits on IGDB.com. “IGDB Want to Play”: Additions to IGDB users'' “Want to Play” lists. “IGDB Playing”: Additions to IGDB users’ “Playing” lists. “IGDB Played”: Additions to IGDB users’ “Played” lists. “Steam 24hr Peak Players”: Peak CCU over the past 24 hours. “Steam Positive Reviews”: Total number of positive reviews. “Steam Negative Reviews”: Total number of negative reviews. “Steam Total Reviews”: Total number of reviews. “Steam Global Top Sellers”: Top sellers globally. “Most Wishlisted Upcoming”: Upcomming wishlisted games. “Twitch Hours Watched”: Hours Watched per game category on Twitch.'
